title: Penguin Paradise
desc: Raise a virtual penguin, catch fish, unlock magical sanctuaries, and collect accessories!

title: Bubble Pop
desc: Pop colorful bubbles, beat your high score, climb the levels, and collect power-ups!

title: Memory Match
desc: Flip cards, find matching pairs, and climb through levels with increasing difficulty!

title: Dart Dash
desc: Test your aim! Hit moving targets, pop balloons, and climb the levels!

title: Space Blaster
desc: Blast through asteroid fields and alien ships in this cosmic shooter!

title: Word Wizard
desc: Spell words, solve anagrams, and become a word wizard!

title: Race Rush
desc: Race against the clock on twisting tracks with power-ups and shortcuts!

title: Farm Friends
desc: Grow crops, raise animals, and build your dream farm!

title: Puzzle Path
desc: Navigate mazes, solve puzzles, and find the hidden treasure!

title: Pet Rescue
desc: Rescue adorable animals, heal them, and find them loving homes!

title: Ninja Jump
desc: Jump, dash, and flip through treacherous platforms as a ninja!

title: Magic Canvas
desc: Paint over glowing orbs to collect them! Build combos, survive waves, and chase the high score in this glow chase game!

title: Ocean Explorer
desc: Dive into the deep sea, discover marine life, and build your aquarium!

title: Chef's Kitchen
desc: Cook delicious meals, manage your restaurant, and become a master chef!

title: Dino Dig
desc: Excavate fossils, assemble dinosaur skeletons, and build your museum!

title: Super Builder
desc: Design and build houses, towers, and cities block by block!

title: Math Games
desc: Solve fun math challenges, beat the clock, and become a math whiz!

title: Tic Tac Toe
desc: Play the classic game of X and O against friends or the AI!

title: Snake
desc: Guide the snake to eat food, grow longer, and avoid crashing into walls!

title: Flappy Bird
desc: Tap to fly through pipes and beat your high score in this addictive jumper!

title: Rock Paper Scissors
desc: Challenge the computer in the classic hand game of strategy and luck!

title: Hangman
desc: Guess the hidden word letter by letter before the stick figure is complete!

title: Simon Says
desc: Watch the pattern, repeat the sequence, and test your memory!
